phrases.intent_en: Ask where folk museum entrance is
phrases.text_local: Kde je vstup do muzea lidové kultury?
phrases.cultural_note: In villages, directions often use local landmarks like the chapel or prominent trees instead of street names.

likely_response.translation_en: On the right behind the chapel, by the linden trees.

responses.english: On the right behind the chapel, by the linden trees.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book village guided tour
phrases.text_local: Jak si mohu rezervovat komentovanou prohlídku obce?
phrases.cultural_note: In smaller Czech villages, guided tours are often arranged informally through the obecní úřad rather than a dedicated agency.

likely_response.local: Stačí se domluvit na obecním úřadě.
likely_response.translation_en: Just arrange it at the municipal office.

responses.english: Just arrange it at the municipal office.
responses.local: Stačí se domluvit na obecním úřadě.

phrases.cultural_note: Parking for visitors in spread-out villages is often concentrated at a designated lot near a landmark like a pond rather than on the square itself.

likely_response.translation_en: At the edge of the village, by the pond.

responses.english: At the edge of the village, by the pond.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if chapel is open to visitors
phrases.text_local: Je kaple svatého Václava přístupná návštěvníkům?
phrases.cultural_note: Small village chapels often remain open during daytime, though official hours may not be posted.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is usually unlocked during the day.

responses.english: Yes, it is usually unlocked during the day.
